name: Vivek Kumar
title: Lead Mobile Developer · Sr. Mobile Developer · Flutter · React Native · Ionic · Android · iOS
summary: Passionate Mobile Lead and Senior Developer with 9 years of experience delivering high-quality, scalable, and maintainable applications across Android, iOS, Flutter, and React Native platforms.

Proven expertise in leading end-to-end product lifecycles - from concept, roadmap, architecture, and implementation to release management, deployment, and long-term support. Strong experience mentoring engineering teams, conducting code reviews, establishing technical best practices, and improving delivery predictability in fast-paced Agile environments.

Specialized in cross-platform architecture, Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), BLE/IoT integrations, healthcare systems, enterprise mobility, CI/CD automation, and mobile performance optimization.

Partner closely with product managers, business stakeholders, QA teams, designers, DevOps teams, and backend engineers to translate business goals into scalable, user-centric mobile solutions that improve reliability, performance, and time-to-market.
Seeking to leverage strong technical depth, engineering leadership, architecture ownership, and product mindset to drive measurable business outcomes and build impactful mobile experiences.

strengths.title: Engineering Leadership
strengths.description: I don't just write code; I build teams. I have a proven track record of mentoring developers, conducting rigorous code reviews, and implementing Clean Architecture and DDD to ensure projects remain scalable and debt-free.

strengths.title: Specialized Domain Knowledge
strengths.description: I thrive in high-stakes environments, including Healthcare, Logistics, and IoT. My experience with BLE/Wi-Fi integrations and real-time systems means I'm comfortable at the intersection of hardware and software.

strengths.title: Product Mindset
strengths.description: I view myself as a partner to stakeholders. I collaborate closely with PMs and designers to ensure every feature we ship solves a real-world problem and improves time-to-market.

strengths.title: Modernization Expert
strengths.description: I specialize in native-to-Flutter transitions, helping companies modernize their tech stacks without losing performance or user trust.

bullets: Leading and collaborating with a diverse team of mobile developers, providing technical guidance, mentorship, architecture ownership, and hands-on development support.
Managing resource allocation, sprint planning, code reviews, technical documentation, and stakeholder communication to ensure successful project delivery.
Defining scalable mobile architectures and implementing best engineering practices to maintain clean, maintainable, and reusable codebases.
Played a key role in migrating legacy applications into modern Flutter and React Native ecosystems.
Strengthened CI/CD pipelines, QA processes, and deployment strategies to reduce release failures and improve delivery efficiency.
Fostered a culture of continuous improvement, technical excellence, and collaborative problem-solving.
Improved application performance through profiling, caching, lazy loading, widget rebuild optimization, and memory optimization.

experience.company: Carrier Technologies (via Drepp Technologies Pvt. Ltd.)
bullets: Worked as a Senior Flutter Developer for the Kidde IoT platform focused on smart home safety and indoor air quality systems.
Integrated Kidde Residential IoT devices including Smoke + Carbon Monoxide detectors, Water Leak sensors, and IAQ monitoring systems.
Contributed to migrating existing native Android and iOS applications into a unified Flutter ecosystem.
Designed and developed modern UI/UX screens along with scalable Flutter architecture implementations.
Implemented QR-based device commissioning, BLE/Wi-Fi communication, OTA firmware updates, property/device management, notifications, and family account management.
Integrated Google Home, Alexa, subscription management, and in-app purchases.
Wrote unit tests, widget tests, and participated in peer code reviews to improve application quality.
Led a team of 3 mobile developers in delivering healthcare applications across India, Colombia, Ecuador, and South Africa.
Architected and developed scalable multi-tenant healthcare systems supporting clinics, pharmacies, wellness platforms, and corporate healthcare ecosystems.

Built custom Flutter plugins integrating GloryFit smart bands using BLE communication for health monitoring including SpO₂, blood pressure, heart rate, temperature, sleep tracking, and activity monitoring.
Developed applications from scratch using the latest Flutter architecture and scalable state management patterns.
Conducted regular code reviews, performance profiling, debugging, refactoring, and QA collaboration to ensure high-quality releases.
Reduced application load time by 40% through performance optimization and caching strategies.
Achieved 95% automation coverage with QA and DevOps collaboration.
Migrated applications to newer Flutter versions and improved plugin compatibility.
Contributed to Flutter Web migration and cross-platform optimization.
Integrated healthcare monitor devices including ECG, BP monitor, glucose monitor, SpO₂ monitor, spirometer, and heart rate sensors.
Implemented chat systems, real-time video streaming, Firebase push notifications, and Socket.io communication.
Improved Bluetooth communication stability and observability across Android and iOS.
Led a team of 5 developers across multiple healthcare and logistics applications.
Improved on-time delivery and sprint predictability through Agile methodologies and risk management.
Delivered multilingual and multi-currency applications for international markets including Brazil and Azerbaijan.
Coordinated with external vendors and stakeholders for successful project delivery.
Developed Android applications for healthcare logistics, diagnostics, physiotherapy, and order management.
Built native Android apps for Field Officer Delivery and Order Booking across Diagnostics, Radiology, Medicines, Consultation, and Physiotherapy with a multi-business cart.
Implemented real-time order & geo tracking, prescription uploads, SLA calc, PODs, payment integrations, barcode scanning, OTP functionality, Firebase push notifications and WebRTC video consultation.
Integrated payments methods with Ezetap, Paytm QR, and Pine Labs.
Improved application performance and optimized APK size.

projects.name: Metro City Pulse
projects.desc: Built a cross-platform smart city monitoring app with Google Maps incident tracking, operational dashboards, CCTV-backed alerts, and adaptive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
fullDescription: Implemented an interactive Google Maps dashboard with incident markers, severity legends, custom info windows, filter controls, zoom tools, and periodic data refresh for live operational views.
Designed and developed a real-time smart city monitoring dashboard as a cross-platform Flutter app for web, Android, iOS, macOS, Linux, and Windows from a single codebase.
Built stats and alerts workspaces with KPI summary cards, tabbed case status, confidence scoring, date-range selection, and CCTV video playback for incident review.

Applied Clean Architecture with Riverpod state management, GoRouter navigation, repository-based data flow, reusable UI components, and responsive shell layouts that switch between side menu and bottom navigation.

projects.name: Mastermind Driver App
projects.desc: Led migration of a TMS driver app from React Native to Flutter and delivered responsive workflows across mobile, tablet, and web.
fullDescription: Led the migration of a Transportation Management System (TMS) driver application from React Native to Flutter, significantly enhancing performance, maintainability, and scalability across mobile and tablet devices.

Redesigned and implemented tablet-optimized workflows, enabling drivers to seamlessly view routes, dispatch loads, log time-in/time-out, and update commodity details with improved usability and responsiveness.
Built responsive and adaptive UI components to ensure a consistent and intuitive experience across diverse device sizes and orientations.

Upheld high code quality standards through modular architecture, robust state management, strict linting, and peer code reviews—resulting in clean, production-ready Flutter code that accelerated feature delivery and strengthened long-term multi-platform support.

projects.name: The Kidde App
projects.desc: Built home safety and IAQ platform with BLE/Wi-Fi commissioning, OTA firmware updates, voice integrations, and subscription support.
fullDescription: Designed and developed the Kidde Home Safety & IAQ app, an IoT platform for managing Smoke + CO alarms, Water Leak, and Wi-Fi Smoke devices across multiple properties, offering real-time alerts, smart hush, and air quality monitoring.
Led end-to-end mobile development from native Android/iOS to Flutter, including UI/UX creation, device commissioning (manual/QR via BLE & Wi-Fi), OTA firmware updates, and user/family management.
Integrated Alexa and Google Home for voice control and in-app purchases for subscription management;
Contributed Flutter widgets, unit tests, code coverage, and peer code reviews to ensure high-quality delivery.

projects.name: Flutter Dev Portfolio
projects.desc: Built a responsive Flutter web and mobile portfolio with JSON-driven content, Riverpod state management, and adaptive section layouts.
fullDescription: Designed and developed a personal developer portfolio as a cross-platform Flutter app deployable to web, Android, and iOS from a single codebase.
Structured the UI with scroll-synced section navigation, responsive carousels, and theme-aware components that adapt across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.
Loaded portfolio content from JSON assets so projects, experience, skills, and reviews can be updated without code changes.
Applied Clean Architecture with Riverpod providers, domain use cases, and reusable presentation widgets for maintainable, testable code.

projects.name: Flutter Band Fit (Plugin)
projects.desc: Created a cross-platform Flutter plugin with GloryFit/UTE SDK for health vitals sync, reminders, watch faces, and device management.
fullDescription: Created a cross-platform Flutter plugin integrating GloryFit and UTE SDK for health-monitoring smart bands via BLE communication.
Supported real-time syncing of health vitals including SpO₂, blood pressure, heart rate, temperature, sleep tracking, and activity monitoring.
Implemented watch face customization, alarm and reminder management, sedentary alerts, and device firmware updates.

projects.name: Docty Clinics
projects.desc: Developed a clinic and pharmacy operations app supporting staff, physician, appointment, consultation, and branch management.
fullDescription: Developed a comprehensive mobile application designed to streamline the operations of clinics and pharmacies.
The platform enables efficient management of staff, patients, physicians, specialties, laboratories, consultations, and branch-level administration.
It supports configuration of operating hours, schedules, and availability, along with customizable SMS/email templates for automated communication.

The system also includes modules for appointment scheduling, subscription plans, service packages, coupons, and departmental organization - providing a unified and scalable digital healthcare management solution.

projects.name: Docty Digital Health for All
projects.desc: Delivered a multi-region healthcare platform with video consults, EHR/PHR, real-time chat, biometrics, and payment gateway integrations.
fullDescription: Delivered a multi-region healthcare platform serving patients and providers across India, Colombia, Ecuador, and South Africa.
Built video consultation, EHR/PHR management, real-time chat using Socket.io, biometric device integrations (ECG, BP, glucose, SpO₂, spirometer), and payment gateway integrations.
Reduced application load time by 40% through performance optimization and caching strategies, achieving 95% automation coverage with QA collaboration.

projects.name: CHHelps
projects.desc: Led end-to-end RN app delivery with dynamic workflows and Ezetap POS payment integration through native bridge.
fullDescription: Led end-to-end React Native application delivery with dynamic form-driven workflows and multi-business cart functionality.
Integrated Ezetap POS payment terminal through a native bridge module, enabling seamless in-field payment processing.
Built real-time order tracking, SLA calculation, proof-of-delivery capture, and push notification features.

projects.name: CallHealth Partners
projects.desc: Built enhanced order execution platform with multi-business cart, self-allocation, QR, GPS tracking, and WebRTC AV support.
fullDescription: Built an enhanced order execution platform for healthcare field operations across Diagnostics, Radiology, Medicines, Consultation, and Physiotherapy.
Implemented multi-business cart, self-allocation, QR/barcode scanning, real-time GPS tracking, prescription uploads, and WebRTC audio/video consultation support.
Delivered multilingual and multi-currency capabilities for international markets including Brazil and Azerbaijan.

projects.name: CHInfoaids
projects.desc: Implemented real-time video consultation and chat app with Firebase, WebRTC, and medical device integrations.
fullDescription: Implemented a real-time video consultation and chat application for healthcare providers and patients.
Integrated Firebase push notifications, WebRTC for audio/video streaming, and Socket.io for real-time messaging.
Connected medical devices including ECG, BP monitor, glucose monitor, SpO₂ monitor, spirometer, and heart rate sensors for remote health monitoring.

projects.name: PraCHtizDoc
projects.desc: Developed internal field-force app integrating payments, barcode scanning, socket communication, and REST workflows.
fullDescription: Developed an internal field-force operations app using the Ionic framework for cross-platform deployment.
Integrated payments (Ezetap, Paytm QR, Pine Labs), barcode scanning, socket-based real-time communication, and REST API workflows.
Supported order booking, field officer dispatch, OTP verification, and delivery tracking.

projects.name: Yellows & Greens
projects.desc: Built cross-platform grocery app with home delivery/store pickup, tracking, wallet, and complaint management.
fullDescription: Built a cross-platform grocery delivery application using Flutter with home delivery and store pickup options.
Implemented real-time order tracking, digital wallet, complaint management, and push notifications for order updates.
Designed responsive UI for seamless shopping experience across Android and iOS platforms.

projects.name: Y&G Partner
projects.desc: Created admin and delivery app for stock, pricing, earnings tracking, and push-enabled order handling.
fullDescription: Created an admin and delivery partner app for the Yellows & Greens grocery platform.
Built features for stock management, dynamic pricing, earnings tracking, and push notification-enabled order handling.
Enabled delivery partners to manage their schedules, track deliveries, and update order statuses in real-time.

reviews.quote: Vivek is one of the best employee/colleague I ever meet. He is very passionate about his work and fully focused towards it. He strongly believes E2E development for each task. As an Android/React Native developer he handles all modules from coding to deployment. I am very glad that he was my colleague.
reviews.name: Prakash Pradhan

reviews.quote: He is a great performer and very confident to handle the whole project single-handedly. Great experience working with Vivek. All the best.
reviews.name: Padmabhushan Singh

reviews.quote: 'Genuine expert' is the phrase that comes to mind when I think about Vivek Kumar. His ability to handle multiple projects was unlike any I've seen before and made a dramatic increase in the productivity level of our company. No matter how tense a meeting, Vivek made sure everyone left with a smile. As a team member or a leader, Vivek earns my highest recommendation.
reviews.name: Sowjanya Pothireddi
reviews.role: Agile Delivery · Scrum Master · Project Management

reviews.quote: Vivek has good insights and is a highly motivated person. He has a keen eye for detail. It was wonderful collaborating with him in designing multi-tenant apps when we worked together at CallHealth. He would surely be an asset to any company.
reviews.name: Pallav Ghose
